proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients without `npm1_mutation`.

analyses.method: Two-sample difference in proportions on `objective_response`.
analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response was 23.46% with `npm1_mutation` versus 16.73% without it; risk difference +6.74 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `npm1_mutation` and `objective_response` remains after adjusting for AML genetics, treatment indicators, performance status, age, and disease-burden markers.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with heteroskedasticity-robust standard errors.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear-probability coefficient for `npm1_mutation` was +0.06746, indicating a +6.75 percentage-point response difference after adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive `npm1_mutation` association with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `tp53_mutation` than in patients without `tp53_mutation`.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with interaction term.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `npm1_mutation` by `tp53_mutation` interaction was -0.07697, consistent with TP53-mutated disease attenuating the NPM1-associated response advantage.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive `npm1_mutation` association with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `complex_karyotype` than in patients without `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with interaction term.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `npm1_mutation` by `complex_karyotype` interaction was -0.09696, indicating strong attenuation of the NPM1 response advantage in complex karyotype disease.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `tp53_mutation` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients without `tp53_mutation`, independent of treatments, other mutations, and disease-burden markers.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with heteroskedasticity-robust standard errors.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `tp53_mutation` was -0.02628, a 2.63 percentage-point lower response probability.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `complex_karyotype` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients without `complex_karyotype`, independent of treatments, other mutations, and disease-burden markers.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with heteroskedasticity-robust standard errors.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `complex_karyotype` was -0.02386, a 2.39 percentage-point lower response probability.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with both `tp53_mutation` and `complex_karyotype` have a more-than-additive decrease in `objective_response` compared with what would be expected from the two features separately.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with interaction term.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `tp53_mutation` by `complex_karyotype` interaction was +0.02122 and was not significant, so there was no evidence for a more-than-additive adverse interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `secondary_aml` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients without `secondary_aml` after adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with heteroskedasticity-robust standard errors.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `secondary_aml` was +0.00043 with p=0.9139, providing no evidence of lower response after adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 1-point increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with a lower `objective_response` probability after adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with heteroskedasticity-robust standard errors.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `ecog_ps` was -0.05223 per 1-point increase, a 5.22 percentage-point lower response probability.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 10-year increase in `age_years` is associated with a lower `objective_response` probability after adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with age centered and scaled per 10 years.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `age_years` per 10 years was -0.00073 with p=0.6439, showing no meaningful independent age effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 10 percentage-point increase in `blast_pct_marrow` is associated with a lower `objective_response` probability after adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model plus quartile contrast.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `blast_pct_marrow` per 10 percentage points was -0.00766. In an unadjusted quartile contrast, the highest quartile had 16.64% response versus 20.65% in the lowest quartile.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 10 k/uL increase in `wbc_k_per_ul` is associated with a lower `objective_response` probability after adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model plus quartile contrast.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `wbc_k_per_ul` per 10 k/uL was -0.00255. Highest versus lowest quartile response was 17.60% versus 19.89%.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 1 g/dL increase in `albumin_g_dl` is associated with a higher `objective_response` probability after adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model plus quartile contrast.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `albumin_g_dl` per 1 g/dL was +0.01810. Highest versus lowest quartile response was 19.78% versus 17.53%.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 5 percentage-point increase in `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with a lower `objective_response` probability after adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model plus quartile contrast.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `weight_loss_pct_6mo` per 5 percentage points was -0.02597. Highest versus lowest quartile response was 15.72% versus 20.46%.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 5 mg/L increase in `crp_mg_l` is associated with a lower `objective_response` probability after adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model plus quartile contrast.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `crp_mg_l` per 5 mg/L was -0.00424. Highest versus lowest quartile response was 17.22% versus 19.46%.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 1-unit increase in `nlr` is associated with a lower `objective_response` probability after adjustment.
Each 100 U/L increase in `ldh_u_l` is associated with a lower `objective_response` probability after adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with heteroskedasticity-robust standard errors.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `nlr` per 1 unit was +0.00020 with p=0.8131, refuting a negative independent association.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with heteroskedasticity-robust standard errors.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `ldh_u_l` per 100 U/L was -0.00186 with p=0.3826, not statistically significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` have a higher `objective_response` probability than patients not receiving it after adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with treatments, biomarkers, and disease-burden covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` was +0.05423, a 5.42 percentage-point higher response probability overall.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is larger in patients with `unfit_for_intensive` than in patients without `unfit_for_intensive`.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model plus stratified response-rate comparisons.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `unfit_for_intensive` by `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` interaction was +0.15298. Stratified unadjusted response differences were +14.51 percentage points in unfit patients and -0.77 percentage points in fit patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `tp53_mutation` than in patients without `tp53_mutation`.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model plus stratified response-rate comparisons.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `tp53_mutation` by `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` interaction was -0.07178. Stratified unadjusted treatment differences were +6.00 percentage points in TP53-wildtype patients and -0.36 percentage points in TP53-mutated patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with low `albumin_g_dl` at or below the cohort first quartile.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with low-albumin interaction term.
analyses.result_summary: Using low albumin defined as `albumin_g_dl` <= 3.5, the adjusted low-albumin by venetoclax-azacitidine interaction was -0.01466.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with high `blast_pct_marrow` at or above the cohort third quartile.
The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with high `wbc_k_per_ul` at or above the cohort third quartile.
The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with high `weight_loss_pct_6mo` at or above the cohort third quartile.
The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with high `crp_mg_l` at or above the cohort third quartile.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model.
analyses.result_summary: High blast burden was defined as `blast_pct_marrow` >= 73.3. The interaction with venetoclax-azacitidine was +0.01163 and not significant.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model.
analyses.result_summary: High WBC was defined as `wbc_k_per_ul` >= 24.1. The interaction with venetoclax-azacitidine was +0.00220 and not significant.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model.
analyses.result_summary: High weight loss was defined as `weight_loss_pct_6mo` >= 6.4. The interaction with venetoclax-azacitidine was -0.00487 and not significant.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model.
analyses.result_summary: High CRP was defined as `crp_mg_l` >= 7.04. The interaction with venetoclax-azacitidine was -0.00948 and not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_7plus3` have a higher `objective_response` probability than patients not receiving it after adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with treatments, biomarkers, and disease-burden covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `treatment_7plus3` was +0.00198 with p=0.5667, showing no overall response advantage.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `treatment_7plus3` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `complex_karyotype` than in patients without `complex_karyotype`.
The association of `treatment_7plus3` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `unfit_for_intensive` than in patients without `unfit_for_intensive`.
The association of `treatment_7plus3` with `objective_response` is larger in patients with `npm1_mutation` than in patients without `npm1_mutation`.
The association of `treatment_7plus3` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients aged 75 years or older than in younger patients.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model plus stratified response-rate comparisons.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `complex_karyotype` by `treatment_7plus3` interaction was -0.03281. Unadjusted treatment difference was -2.32 percentage points in complex karyotype disease and +0.72 points without complex karyotype.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `unfit_for_intensive` by `treatment_7plus3` interaction was -0.00240 and not significant.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `npm1_mutation` by `treatment_7plus3` interaction was -0.01261 with p=0.1018, not supporting larger benefit in NPM1-mutated patients.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted age >=75 by `treatment_7plus3` interaction was +0.00807 and not significant, opposite the hypothesized smaller benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `flt3_itd`, `treatment_midostaurin` is associated with higher `objective_response` than in FLT3-ITD patients not receiving midostaurin.
Among patients with `flt3_itd`, `treatment_gilteritinib` is associated with higher `objective_response` than in FLT3-ITD patients not receiving gilteritinib.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model plus FLT3-ITD subgroup response-rate comparison.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `flt3_itd` by `treatment_midostaurin` interaction was -0.01424. In FLT3-ITD patients, unadjusted response was 17.64% on midostaurin versus 19.14% off.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model plus FLT3-ITD subgroup response-rate comparison.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `flt3_itd` by `treatment_gilteritinib` interaction was +0.01016 and not significant. In FLT3-ITD patients, unadjusted response difference was only +0.23 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `idh1_mutation`, `treatment_ivosidenib` is associated with higher `objective_response` than in IDH1-mutated patients not receiving ivosidenib.
Among patients with `idh2_mutation`, `treatment_enasidenib` is associated with higher `objective_response` than in IDH2-mutated patients not receiving enasidenib.
The association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients aged 75 years or older than in younger patients.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model plus IDH1-mutated subgroup response-rate comparison.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `idh1_mutation` by `treatment_ivosidenib` interaction was -0.04506 with p=0.0430, opposite the hypothesized positive biomarker-treatment association. In IDH1-mutated patients, unadjusted response was 15.44% on ivosidenib versus 19.42% off.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model plus IDH2-mutated subgroup response-rate comparison.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `idh2_mutation` by `treatment_enasidenib` interaction was +0.00718 with p=0.7435, providing no evidence of an IDH2-specific response advantage.

analyses.method: Adjusted interaction model.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted age >=75 by `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` interaction was -0.00804 with p=0.2744, not statistically significant.
